title: SR 18-9: Frequently Asked Questions on the Appraisal Regulations and the Interagency Appraisal and Evaluation Guidelines

BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT: 2.
